title: sphaeropteris zamboangana
intro: Sphaeropteris zamboangana, also known as Zamboanga tree fern, is a species of tree fern that belongs to the family Cyathea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Sphaeropteris zamboangana include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, Sphaeropteris zamboangana is often used in the form of tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make poultices and ointments for topical application.
